pr_title: Add CSV row parsing for the order import job
pr_description: Adds parse_row()/parse_rows() to normalize uploaded CSV rows into order records, skipping any malformed rows.
injected_issue: parse_row() uses a bare `except: pass`, silently swallowing every exception (including unrelated bugs and control-flow exceptions) with no logging, while parse_rows() uses print() for its own diagnostics even though the module already defines a logger -- inconsistent, silent error handling.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: The malformed-row test only asserts that parse_rows() returns an empty list, never that anything was logged or how the failure was surfaced, so the bare except and the print/logger inconsistency both pass unnoticed.
